description: Pokemon Pikachu 2 GS pair — electronics repair and cleaning and refresh.
itemDetails:
A Pokemon Pikachu pair in a Gold/Silver-era style aligns with the franchise's major expansion around the 1999-2001 period and its long-running licensed merchandise programs. Official products are tied to The Pokemon Company/Nintendo licensing and were produced by multiple makers across regions.

Depending on format (plush or figures), materials are usually polyester textile bodies or PVC/ABS molded parts with painted features. Collector demand for Pikachu is consistently strong, and value improves when both pieces are matched as a set, authentic, and free of heavy paint or fabric wear.
